articles.description: Abed Abou Shhadeh, a political commentator in Israel, says the ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon is ‘problematic'.

articles.title: Women Reservation Act 2023 comes into force ahead of voting to its amendment in LS
articles.description: Women Reservation Act 2023 comes into force ahead of voting to its amendment in LS

articles.title: Women's Reservation Act comes into force even as House debates its implementation
articles.description: Womens Reservation Act comes into force even as House debates its implementation

articles.title: Why Modi is betting political capital on 33% women's reservation law
articles.description: Why Modi is betting political capital on  womens reservation law

articles.title: Peninsula Land forays into plotted real estate in Alibaug
articles.description: It’s first project is in Alibaug which is close to Mumbai and targeted at high networth individuals (HNIs) from Mumbai and property investors from India and abroad

articles.title: Petrol, diesel prices on 17 April: Fuel rates today in Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Chennai, Kolkata and other cities
articles.description: Petrol and diesel prices remained unchanged on 17 April in India, but aviation fuel prices showed volatility due to the West Asia conflict. Check fuel in your city today.

articles.title: Kerala dental student death: Case against InstaPay loan app for alleged harassment and intimidation
articles.description: FIR states agents of the app repeatedly contacted and threatened Nithin Raj for loan repayment, subjecting him to sustained mental harassment and intimidation

articles.title: Prime Minister, Vice-President pay tribute to Chandra Shekhar on birth anniversary
articles.description: PM Modi recalled his personal interactions with the former Prime Minister and also urged young Indians to learn more about the leader’s work

articles.title: With BDS student’s death in Kannur, caste bias back in focus
articles.description: The death of a student of Kannur Dental College has raised disturbing questions about caste discrimination on Kerala’s college campuses. The college has dismissed a faculty member and suspended another, pending inquiry. The incident led to an outpouring of related complaints from other students. The bereaved family, the student’s college-mates, faculty, and activists express their views

topStories.title: What we know about the ceasefire between Lebanon and Israel
topStories.description: A 10-day truce between the two countries now in effect, with Iran-backed Hezbollah voicing support, as negotiations continue between the US and Iran.

topStories.title: Trump calls war on Iran a ‘little diversion’
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump has described the war on Iran which has killed more than 2,000 people as a ‘little diversion’.

topStories.title: Trump Says Iran Is Ready To Return Its 'Nuclear Dust'. What And Where Is It?
topStories.description: Tehran has said its objective in enriching uranium is power generation and energy security, not a nuclear weapon. But the available data suggests otherwise.

topStories.title: ‘Something to Prove’: A coming-of-age story for the late bloomer
topStories.description: American writer-actor Anita Kalathara draws from her own life to craft a relatable series on identity, family and independence

topStories.title: Who Is Taranjit Singh Sandhu? The New Lieutenant Governor Of Delhi
topStories.description: Sandhu, a former Indian diplomat, served as India's Ambassador to the US during Trump's first presidency.

topStories.title: AP Congress leader Shivaji opposes Delimitation Bill 2026, says it hurts southern States
topStories.description: Congress leader Kolanukonda Shivaji opposes the Delimitation Bill, 2026, saying it will hurt southern States including Andhra Pradesh

topStories.title: On the Sabarimala temple entry case
topStories.description: As a Supreme Court Bench examines the broader implications of its 2018 Sabarimala ruling, the case prompts a look into the evolution of the essential religious practice doctrine, role of the State and the judiciary in religious reform, and the arguments over whether Ayyappa followers qualify as a religious denomination

topStories.title: Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth reads fake Bible verse from Pulp Fiction
topStories.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth read a prayer drawn from a misquote of Ezekiel 25:17 in Pulp Fiction.

topStories.title: Hormuz Blockade Stirs Tension Over Malacca Strait Near Singapore
topStories.description: The Iranian and US blockades of the Strait of Hormuz are reviving anxiety over the fate of Asia’s most crucial strategic bottleneck.

topStories.title: US Iran War LIVE: Trump calls Iran war 'perfect', claims Tehran agreed to return ‘nuclear dust’
topStories.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: Iran has repeatedly insisted that it doesn’t seek a nuclear weapon and that its program is for peaceful proposes. Neither Iran nor countries acting as intermediaries in the conflict have talked about what would be a major breakthrough.

topStories.title: Donald Trump alleges ‘Mamdani is DESTROYING New York’: ‘Tax policies so wrong’ | Watch
topStories.description: Governor Hochul plans a new tax on multimillion-dollar second homes in NYC, aiming for $500 million in revenue to support the city’s budget.

topStories.title: Oil Price Today (April 17): Crude oil prices fall on Israel-Lebanon ceasefire, Iran war peace talks. Is the worst over?
topStories.description: Oil prices dipped as Middle East tensions eased with a Lebanon-Israel ceasefire and potential US-Iran talks. President Trump indicated a deal with Iran was close, following a 10-day truce that removes a key obstacle to negotiations. Experts anticipate continued volatility but expect prices to remain supported.

dailyNews.description: The State Department said it imposed visa restrictions on 26 individuals under the expanded policy targeting those acting for U.S. adversaries.

dailyNews.title: Singer D4vd arrested and held without bail in case tied to teen found dead in Tesla: Police
dailyNews.description: Singer D4vd, whose real name is David Burke, was arrested in connection with the murder of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez in LA, LAPD says.

dailyNews.title: EXCLUSIVE: NYC officials refuse ICE hold for illegal alien accused in arson that killed 4 and injured 7: DHS
dailyNews.description: A Mexican national illegal alien accused of randomly setting a NYC apartment on fire that killed four could be released due to the city's sanctuary policies, DHS says.

dailyNews.title: Former SMU cornerback Teddy Knox faces $2.88M judgment for crash linked to Rashee Rice's Lamborghini race
dailyNews.description: Teddy Knox, who was racing Rashee Rice's Lamborghini in a 2024 Dallas crash, was ordered to pay $2.88 million in a default judgment lawsuit.

dailyNews.title: Miami Catholic Charities loses $11M contract providing care for migrant children under Trump administration
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration canceled an $11 million Catholic Charities contract in Miami, citing a drop in illegal immigration and fewer unaccompanied minors.

dailyNews.title: Blue Panther and Último Guerrero steal the show at CMLL's first-ever US event in Las Vegas
dailyNews.description: Blue Panther defeated Último Guerrero in a legends match at CMLL's historic first solo U.S. show held at the Palms Casino Resort in Las Vegas Thursday.

dailyNews.title: Ex-teacher faces 25 charges, including rape and abuse as investigation widens
dailyNews.description: Former Louisiana teacher Marisa Noel faces 25 charges, including indecent behavior with juveniles and first-degree rape, the sheriff's office said.

dailyNews.title: Rogan backs reality TV star Spencer Pratt’s bid for LA Mayor, says ‘I’d vote for you’
dailyNews.description: Joe Rogan endorses Spencer Pratt for Los Angeles mayor, saying he would absolutely vote for the reality TV star if he still lived in California.

dailyNews.title: Missing pregnant woman found dead after mysterious Texas disappearance
dailyNews.description: Ashanti Allen, a 23-year-old woman who disappeared while eight months pregnant, was found dead in Houston, her family confirmed. No arrests have been reported.

dailyNews.title: Franklin Graham defends Trump in letter shared on Truth Social after AI ‘Jesus’ image backlash
dailyNews.description: Rev. Franklin Graham defended Trump over an AI-generated image controversy, saying the president thought it depicted a doctor helping someone, not Jesus.

dailyNews.title: Trump to Pick Ousted FEMA Head to Lead Agency Again
dailyNews.description: Cameron Hamilton is a former Navy SEAL who ran unsuccessfully for Congress.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is the End of a 100-Year Experiment
dailyNews.description: A conservative court watcher explains why the president has failed to bend the judicial branch to his will.

dailyNews.title: Where Trump's goals in Iran stand at this point
dailyNews.description: President Trump has repeatedly claimed that the war with Iran is "almost over." He has also stated multiple times that the U.S. is close to accomplishing "all of its goals" in Iran. CBS News' Robert Costa reports and Michael Doran, director of the Center for Peace and Security in the Middle East at the Hudson Institute, have more.

dailyNews.title: Trump continues feud with Pope Leo over war with Iran
dailyNews.description: Earlier this week, President Trump turned his criticism toward an unlikely subject- Pope Leo. Michael O'Loughlin, the executive editor of the National Catholic Reporter, joins "The Daily Report."

dailyNews.title: Trump nominates Dr. Erica Schwartz for new CDC director
dailyNews.description: President Trump nominated a new director for the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention on Thursday. Dr. Erica Schwartz is a former deputy surgeon general and retired Coast Guard rear admiral.

dailyNews.title: Trump announces ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon
dailyNews.description: The ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon could be a major step toward a peace deal for Iran and the US. President Trump says US talks with Iran could restart this weekend, and he’s confident they are close to a deal. NBC News’ Richard Engel has the story.

dailyNews.title: House effort to end Trump's war with Iran fails by one vote
dailyNews.description: The Republican-controlled House rejected a resolution ordering President Donald Trump to end the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump nominates Dr. Erica Schwartz, former deputy surgeon general, for CDC director
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced he was nominating Dr. Erica Schwartz to lead the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.

dailyNews.title: Drugmakers raised prices on hundreds of drugs despite Trump deals, report finds
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said his deals with drugmakers would bring down prescription drug prices in the U.S.

dailyNews.title: Trump says war in Iran is going 'swimmingly' and 'should be ending pretty soon'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's latest prediction on the end of the war against Iran came hours after Israel announced a ceasefire with Lebanon.

dailyNews.title: Trump nominates Erica Schwartz as CDC director amid turmoil around leadership, vaccine policy
dailyNews.description: The CDC has been going through turmoil and several leadership shakeups under HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.

dailyNews.title: Oil falls as Trump reiterates Iran war ‘should’ end soon and Israel-Lebanon truce lifts hopes
dailyNews.description: Oil prices fell after Donald Trump said Israel and Lebanon had agreed to a 10-day ceasefire following talks in Washington.
